name: alma-sonora-bookings
description: Cloudflare Worker + D1 booking backend for Alma Sonora

scripts.db:bookings: wrangler d1 execute alma-sonora-bookings --command "SELECT b.*, e.title FROM bookings b JOIN events e ON e.id = b.event_id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC"
scripts.db:availability: wrangler d1 execute alma-sonora-bookings --command "SELECT e.id, e.title, e.date, e.capacity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.status IN ('confirmed','pending') THEN b.quantity ELSE 0 END),0) AS spots_taken FROM events e LEFT JOIN bookings b ON b.event_id = e.id GROUP BY e.id"
